query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(DISTINCT e.id) AS total_employees,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.is_active = 1 THEN e.id END) AS active_employees,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.is_active = 0 THEN e.id END) AS inactive_employees,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.shift = 'AM' THEN e.id END) AS am_shift,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.shift = 'PM' THEN e.id END) AS pm_shift,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.shift = 'NOC' THEN e.id END) AS noc_shift,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.category = 'ancillary' THEN e.id END) AS ancillary,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.category != 'ancillary' OR e.category IS NULL THEN e.id END) AS non_ancillary,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.is_verified = 1 THEN e.id END) AS verified,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN e.is_verified = 0 OR e.is_verified IS NULL THEN e.id END) AS unverified
FROM employees e
WHERE e.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT employee_id FROM requests);
